header.title: Vile to Villefrance (51013270547).jpg
header.description:
The attractive livery of the former Languedoc-Roussillon region (now Occitanie) had sadly been defaced by vandals in this view of coach 17366 at Ille-sur-Têt, working a service from Perpignan to Villefranche-Vernet-les-Bains. Half of unit Z 7366, it is an SNCF Z 7300 'Type Z2' electric multiple unit. These were built by Alsthom / Francorail-MTE in the early 1980s and have a top speed of 160 km/h (100mph).
Gare d'Ille-sur-Têt
Ille-sur-Têt
Pyrénées-Orientales (66)
Languedoc-Roussillon (now Occitan
header.author: Damo
